Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ROBERT SMITH, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (tel: 310-933-4271) for Plaintiff.
Atty. KEVIN TULLY, Esq. of Law Office of Kevin J. Tully (tel: 650-377-0708) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF AGUSTIN BANDA's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two.

Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. Matter discussed. Counsel Kevin Tully states the protective order was filed, but never signed by a Judge. Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem signing the protective order. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court orders counsel to prepare and submit a stipulation for protective order approved as to form, and email to Judge Pro Tem Andrew Schwartz for signature. After the protective order is signed, the motion may be taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Schwartz; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Allen Amarkarian, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 Attorney for Plaintiff, AGUSTIN PEREZ BANDA
KEVIN J. TULLY, ESQ.LAW OFFICES OF KEVIN J. TULLY (650) 377-0708 kevin@tullylaw.net
Attorney for Defendant FORD MOTOR COMPANY

All parties present stipulate to Jude Pro Tem Scott Borrowman hearing today's motion. Court and counsel authorize the Discovery Clerk to sign the JPT Stipulation on their behalves.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AGUSTIN BANDA'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions Denied without prejudice. Defendant's counsel, Kevin J. Tully is to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Scott borrowman at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
